signals.text: CHURNING: No calls with HAVN since Dec 11, 2025 (125+ days of silence). Last call was a contentious pricing negotiation.
Zero emails found in Gmail for HAVN in the last 30 days - complete communication blackout
No calendar events (past or upcoming) found for HAVN - no meetings scheduled
No Granola meeting notes found for HAVN in the last 60 days - zero engagement
Last call revealed HAVN found better performance for key products outside FERMAT and was shifting significant traffic away
Pricing disagreement unresolved: FERMAT proposed $3,250/month flat fee, Tom wanted commission-only for flexibility. No follow-up recorded.
Churn risk flags from last call: Performance Concerns, Customization Limitations, Price Sensitivity, Perceived Product Replicability, Contract Flexibility Issues

recent.title: HAVN x Fermat Weekly
recent.participants: Tom Guilbert (tom@havnwear.com), Ryan Barry, Isabel O'Keefe
recent.summary: Six-month partnership review generating nearly $300K GMV. Tom highlighted branding limitations and unsustainable fixed fee + commission pricing. HAVN found better performance for key products outside FERMAT, shifting traffic. FERMAT proposed 12-month $3,250/month flat fee; Tom preferred commission-only. Unresolved pricing discussion with follow-up planned but no subsequent call recorded.
action_items: FERMAT team to discuss pricing feedback with finance
Isabel to send copy of current contract addendum
Ryan to send meeting invite for follow-up
Tom to forward invoicing issue email thread

recent.summary: Weekly check-in before the partnership review. Discussed ongoing performance and upcoming contract renewal conversation.

recent.title: HAVN x Fermat Weekly
recent.summary: Routine weekly check-in between Tom and Ryan. General performance discussion.

calls.analysis: HAVN is in critical churn status. The last recorded call was Dec 11, 2025 -- over 4 months ago -- and it was a contentious pricing negotiation where Tom expressed the current model was unsustainable and had already shifted traffic away from FERMAT. The planned follow-up call after Dec 11 was never recorded, suggesting the relationship may have gone cold. Previously, HAVN had weekly calls with Ryan Barry, indicating a dramatic drop in engagement from weekly to zero.

slack.analysis: No Slack MCP available for this refresh.

email.analysis: Zero email results found for HAVN in the last 30 days. This represents a complete communication blackout. No outreach from Pulkit or any FERMAT team member detected in Gmail. The account appears to have gone fully dark since the contentious pricing discussion in December 2025.
